```{r}
# =========================================================
# MAGeCK gene_summary -> GSEA runner
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# - separate GSEA for positive and negative selection arms
# - excludes multi-target entries (separator ;)
# - runs Hallmark, C2, C5, Reactome
# - summary plot compares NES across arms
# - creates TWO final plot/table modes:
#     1) p.adjust <= 0.30
#     2) pvalue < 0.05
#
# IMPORTANT RANKING LOGIC:
# positive-selection (resistance arm):
#   rank_metric = pos_lfc * -log10(pos_p)
#
# negative-selection (sensitisation arm):
#   rank_metric = (-neg_lfc) * -log10(neg_p)
#
# RATIONALE:
# MAGeCK negative-selection hits often have negative LFC.
# To make strongest sensitising hits rank at the TOP of the
# list for GSEA, we invert neg_lfc during ranking.
#
# FINAL VISUALISATION LOGIC:
# - keep only NES > 0
# - for padj mode: p.adjust <= 0.30
# - for pvalue mode: pvalue < 0.05
# - paired scatter keeps only pathways with NES > 0 in BOTH arms
# =========================================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(tibble)
  library(readr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(stringr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(clusterProfiler)
  library(enrichplot)
  library(msigdbr)
  library(ReactomePA)
})
```

```{r}
set.seed(1234)

# =========================================================
# INPUT / OUTPUT
# =========================================================
mageck_file <- "input lists/mageck_outputs/FILTERING_T0_ONLY_PAIRED_MEDIAN/FILTERING_TO_ONLY_PAIRED_MEDIAN.gene_summary.txt"

run_date  <- format(Sys.Date(), "%Y_%m_%d")
run_label <- paste0(run_date, "_GSEA_MAGeCK_LFCp")

out_dir <- file.path(
  "CRISPR_screen_GSEA/pvaluebased/FILTERING_TO_ONLY_PAIRED_MEDIAN",
  run_label
)
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# HELPERS
# =========================================================
guess_col <- function(df, candidates, what) {
  hit <- candidates[candidates %in% colnames(df)][1]
  if (is.na(hit)) {
    stop("Could not find ", what, " column. Tried: ",
         paste(candidates, collapse = ", "))
  }
  hit
}

find_optional <- function(df, candidates) {
  hit <- candidates[candidates %in% colnames(df)][1]
  if (is.na(hit)) return(NA_character_)
  hit
}

safe_write_csv <- function(x, path) {
  dir.create(dirname(path), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  tryCatch(
    readr::write_csv(x, path),
    error = function(e) message("WARN: write_csv failed: ", path, " | ", e$message)
  )
  invisible(TRUE)
}

safe_save_rds <- function(x, path) {
  dir.create(dirname(path), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  tryCatch(
    saveRDS(x, path),
    error = function(e) message("WARN: saveRDS failed: ", path, " | ", e$message)
  )
  invisible(TRUE)
}

safe_ggsave <- function(path, plot, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300) {
  dir.create(dirname(path), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  tryCatch(
    ggplot2::ggsave(path, plot, width = width, height = height, dpi = dpi),
    error = function(e) message("WARN: ggsave failed: ", path, " | ", e$message)
  )
  invisible(TRUE)
}

clean_gene_symbol <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- trimws(x)
  x <- sub("^gene:", "", x)
  x
}

# only ";" defines multi-target in your design
is_multi_target <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  grepl(";", x, fixed = TRUE)
}

to_num <- function(x) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))

pull_optional_num <- function(df, colname) {
  if (is.na(colname)) return(rep(NA_real_, nrow(df)))
  to_num(df[[colname]])
}

safe_result_tbl <- function(res) {
  tryCatch(
    tibble::as_tibble(res@result),
    error = function(e) tibble::tibble()
  )
}

# =========================================================
# RANKING HELPERS
# =========================================================
compute_lfc_p_metric <- function(lfc, p, p_floor = 1e-300, flip_sign = FALSE) {
  p_use <- pmax(p, p_floor)
  lfc_use <- if (flip_sign) -lfc else lfc
  lfc_use * (-log10(p_use))
}

dedup_for_lfc_p <- function(df, lfc_col, p_col, p_floor = 1e-300, flip_sign = FALSE) {
  df %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(gene), gene != "",
      !is.na(.data[[lfc_col]]), is.finite(.data[[lfc_col]]),
      !is.na(.data[[p_col]]), is.finite(.data[[p_col]]), .data[[p_col]] > 0
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      rank_metric = compute_lfc_p_metric(
        .data[[lfc_col]],
        .data[[p_col]],
        p_floor = p_floor,
        flip_sign = flip_sign
      )
    ) %>%
    group_by(gene) %>%
    slice_max(order_by = abs(rank_metric), n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    ungroup()
}

make_rank_vector_lfc_p <- function(df, gene_col = "gene", lfc_col, p_col,
                                   p_floor = 1e-300, flip_sign = FALSE) {
  x <- df %>%
    dplyr::select(
      gene = all_of(gene_col),
      lfc  = all_of(lfc_col),
      p    = all_of(p_col)
    ) %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(gene), gene != "",
      !is.na(lfc), is.finite(lfc),
      !is.na(p), is.finite(p), p > 0
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      p_use = pmax(p, p_floor),
      lfc_use = if (flip_sign) -lfc else lfc,
      rank_score = lfc_use * -log10(p_use)
    ) %>%
    distinct(gene, .keep_all = TRUE)

  ranks <- x$rank_score
  names(ranks) <- x$gene
  sort(ranks, decreasing = TRUE)
}

export_rank_table_lfc_p <- function(df, lfc_col, p_col, outfile,
                                    p_floor = 1e-300, flip_sign = FALSE) {
  tab <- df %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(gene), gene != "",
      !is.na(.data[[lfc_col]]), is.finite(.data[[lfc_col]]),
      !is.na(.data[[p_col]]), is.finite(.data[[p_col]]), .data[[p_col]] > 0
    ) %>%
    transmute(
      gene = gene,
      lfc  = .data[[lfc_col]],
      p    = .data[[p_col]],
      lfc_used = if (flip_sign) -lfc else lfc,
      rank = compute_lfc_p_metric(
        lfc, p,
        p_floor = p_floor,
        flip_sign = flip_sign
      )
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(rank))

  safe_write_csv(tab, outfile)
}

# =========================================================
# FINAL VISUALIZATION HELPERS
# =========================================================
count_core_genes <- function(core_enrichment_string) {
  if (is.na(core_enrichment_string) || core_enrichment_string == "") return(NA_integer_)
  length(strsplit(core_enrichment_string, "/", fixed = TRUE)[[1]])
}

make_filtered_view <- function(summary_tbl_small,
                               filter_mode = c("padj_0.3", "pval_0.05"),
                               min_leading_edge_n = 3,
                               min_set_size_for_plot = 10) {

  filter_mode <- match.arg(filter_mode)

  x <- summary_tbl_small %>%
    dplyr::select(any_of(c(
      "ID", "Description", "setSize", "NES", "pvalue", "p.adjust",
      "collection", "arm", "core_enrichment"
    ))) %>%
    dplyr::distinct() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      arm = dplyr::recode(
        arm,
        "positive_selection" = "Resistance arm",
        "negative_selection" = "Sensitisation arm"
      ),
      leading_edge_n = vapply(core_enrichment, count_core_genes, integer(1))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      !is.na(arm),
      !is.na(NES),
      NES > 0,
      !is.na(setSize),
      setSize >= min_set_size_for_plot,
      !is.na(leading_edge_n),
      leading_edge_n >= min_leading_edge_n
    )

  if (filter_mode == "padj_0.3") {
    x <- x %>%
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(p.adjust), p.adjust <= 0.30)
    label <- paste0("padj_le_0.3_LE", min_leading_edge_n)
    sort_col <- "p.adjust"
  } else {
    x <- x %>%
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(pvalue), pvalue < 0.05)
    label <- paste0("pvalue_lt_0.05_LE", min_leading_edge_n)
    sort_col <- "pvalue"
  }

  list(data = x, label = label, sort_col = sort_col)
}

save_final_outputs <- function(summary_tbl_small, out_dir,
                               filter_mode = c("padj_0.3", "pval_0.05"),
                               top_n = 15,
                               min_leading_edge_n = 3,
                               min_set_size_for_plot = 10) {

  filter_mode <- match.arg(filter_mode)

  view <- make_filtered_view(
    summary_tbl_small = summary_tbl_small,
    filter_mode = filter_mode,
    min_leading_edge_n = min_leading_edge_n,
    min_set_size_for_plot = min_set_size_for_plot
  )

  x <- view$data
  label <- view$label
  sort_col <- view$sort_col

  safe_write_csv(
    x,
    file.path(out_dir, paste0("GSEA_summary_compact_filtered_", label, ".csv"))
  )

  if (nrow(x) == 0) {
    message("No enriched terms passed final filter: ", label)
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  # -----------------------------------------
  # Top terms per arm/collection
  # -----------------------------------------
  nes_compare <- x %>%
    dplyr::group_by(collection, arm) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(.data[[sort_col]], dplyr::desc(NES), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()

  safe_write_csv(
    nes_compare,
    file.path(out_dir, paste0("NES_compare_top_terms_", label, ".csv"))
  )

  p_nes <- ggplot(
    nes_compare,
    aes(
      x = reorder(Description, NES),
      y = NES,
      size = setSize
    )
  ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.4, colour = "grey60") +
    geom_point() +
    coord_flip() +
    facet_grid(collection ~ arm, scales = "free_y", space = "free_y") +
    labs(
      title = paste0(
        "Top enriched pathways by selection arm (", label, ")\n",
        "Filtered for leading-edge genes >= ", min_leading_edge_n
      ),
      x = NULL,
      y = "Normalized Enrichment Score (NES)",
      size = "Gene set size"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8)
    )

  safe_ggsave(
    file.path(out_dir, paste0("NES_compare_top_terms_", label, ".png")),
    p_nes, width = 11, height = 12, dpi = 300
  )
  safe_ggsave(
    file.path(out_dir, paste0("NES_compare_top_terms_", label, ".pdf")),
    p_nes, width = 11, height = 12, dpi = 300
  )

  # -----------------------------------------
  # Paired comparison between arms
  # only among pathways passing the same filter
  # and only if NES > 0 in BOTH arms
  # -----------------------------------------
  nes_paired <- x %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      arm_short = dplyr::case_when(
        arm == "Resistance arm" ~ "resistance",
        arm == "Sensitisation arm" ~ "sensitisation",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(arm_short)) %>%
    dplyr::select(
      ID, Description, collection, setSize, leading_edge_n,
      arm_short, NES, pvalue, p.adjust
    ) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(
      names_from = arm_short,
      values_from = c(NES, pvalue, p.adjust, leading_edge_n),
      values_fn = dplyr::first
    )

  required_cols <- c("NES_resistance", "NES_sensitisation")
  if (!all(required_cols %in% colnames(nes_paired))) {
    nes_paired <- tibble::tibble()
  } else {
    nes_paired <- nes_paired %>%
      dplyr::filter(
        !is.na(NES_resistance),
        !is.na(NES_sensitisation),
        NES_resistance > 0,
        NES_sensitisation > 0
      )
  }

  safe_write_csv(
    nes_paired,
    file.path(out_dir, paste0("NES_paired_between_arms_", label, ".csv"))
  )

  if (nrow(nes_paired) > 0) {
    if (sort_col == "p.adjust") {
      nes_paired_plot <- nes_paired %>%
        dplyr::mutate(sort_metric = p.adjust_resistance + p.adjust_sensitisation) %>%
        dplyr::group_by(collection) %>%
        dplyr::arrange(sort_metric, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
        dplyr::slice_head(n = 20) %>%
        dplyr::ungroup()
    } else {
      nes_paired_plot <- nes_paired %>%
        dplyr::mutate(sort_metric = pvalue_resistance + pvalue_sensitisation) %>%
        dplyr::group_by(collection) %>%
        dplyr::arrange(sort_metric, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
        dplyr::slice_head(n = 20) %>%
        dplyr::ungroup()
    }

    p_scatter <- ggplot(
      nes_paired_plot,
      aes(
        x = NES_sensitisation,
        y = NES_resistance,
        size = setSize
      )
    ) +
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.4, colour = "grey60") +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.4, colour = "grey60") +
      geom_point() +
      facet_wrap(~ collection, scales = "free") +
      labs(
        title = paste0(
          "Pathways detected in both arms (", label, ")\n",
          "Filtered for leading-edge genes >= ", min_leading_edge_n
        ),
        x = "NES (Sensitisation arm)",
        y = "NES (Resistance arm)",
        size = "Gene set size"
      ) +
      theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
      theme(
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
      )

    safe_ggsave(
      file.path(out_dir, paste0("NES_scatter_pos_vs_neg_", label, ".png")),
      p_scatter, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300
    )
    safe_ggsave(
      file.path(out_dir, paste0("NES_scatter_pos_vs_neg_", label, ".pdf")),
      p_scatter, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300
    )
  }

  invisible(list(
    filtered_table = x,
    nes_compare = nes_compare,
    nes_paired = nes_paired
  ))
}
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# READ MAGeCK GENE SUMMARY
# =========================================================
if (!file.exists(mageck_file)) {
  stop("File not found: ", mageck_file)
}

df <- readr::read_tsv(mageck_file, show_col_types = FALSE)

message("Loaded rows: ", nrow(df))
message("Columns:")
message(paste(colnames(df), collapse = " | "))

# =========================================================
# FIND REQUIRED COLUMNS
# =========================================================
gene_col <- guess_col(
  df,
  c("id", "ID", "Gene", "gene", "Symbol", "symbol"),
  "gene identifier"
)

# optional score columns kept only for export/reference
pos_score_col <- find_optional(df, c("pos|score", "pos.score", "pos_score"))
neg_score_col <- find_optional(df, c("neg|score", "neg.score", "neg_score"))

# required columns for ranking
pos_p_col <- guess_col(
  df,
  c("pos|p-value", "pos|pvalue", "pos.p.value", "pos_p_value"),
  "positive-selection p-value"
)

pos_lfc_col <- guess_col(
  df,
  c("pos|lfc", "pos.lfc", "pos_lfc", "pos|fc", "pos.fc", "pos_fc"),
  "positive-selection LFC"
)

neg_p_col <- guess_col(
  df,
  c("neg|p-value", "neg|pvalue", "neg.p.value", "neg_p_value"),
  "negative-selection p-value"
)

neg_lfc_col <- guess_col(
  df,
  c("neg|lfc", "neg.lfc", "neg_lfc", "neg|fc", "neg.fc", "neg_fc"),
  "negative-selection LFC"
)

# optional columns
pos_fdr_col  <- find_optional(df, c("pos|fdr", "pos.fdr", "pos_fdr"))
pos_rank_col <- find_optional(df, c("pos|rank", "pos.rank", "pos_rank"))

neg_fdr_col  <- find_optional(df, c("neg|fdr", "neg.fdr", "neg_fdr"))
neg_rank_col <- find_optional(df, c("neg|rank", "neg.rank", "neg_rank"))

# =========================================================
# PREP TABLE
# =========================================================
df2 <- df %>%
  transmute(
    gene      = clean_gene_symbol(.data[[gene_col]]),
    pos_score = pull_optional_num(df, pos_score_col),
    neg_score = pull_optional_num(df, neg_score_col),
    pos_p     = to_num(.data[[pos_p_col]]),
    pos_fdr   = pull_optional_num(df, pos_fdr_col),
    pos_rank  = pull_optional_num(df, pos_rank_col),
    pos_lfc   = to_num(.data[[pos_lfc_col]]),
    neg_p     = to_num(.data[[neg_p_col]]),
    neg_fdr   = pull_optional_num(df, neg_fdr_col),
    neg_rank  = pull_optional_num(df, neg_rank_col),
    neg_lfc   = to_num(.data[[neg_lfc_col]])
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(gene), gene != "") %>%
  mutate(
    target_type = ifelse(is_multi_target(gene), "multi_target", "single_target")
  )

safe_write_csv(df2, file.path(out_dir, "mageck_all_targets_cleaned.csv"))

df_single <- df2 %>% filter(target_type == "single_target")
df_multi  <- df2 %>% filter(target_type == "multi_target")

safe_write_csv(df_single, file.path(out_dir, "mageck_single_targets.csv"))
safe_write_csv(df_multi,  file.path(out_dir, "mageck_multi_targets_excluded_from_primary_GSEA.csv"))

message("Single-target rows: ", nrow(df_single))
message("Multi-target rows: ", nrow(df_multi))

# =========================================================
# DEDUPLICATION PER ARM
# IMPORTANT:
# positive-selection:
#   rank_metric = pos_lfc * -log10(pos_p)
#
# negative-selection:
#   rank_metric = (-neg_lfc) * -log10(neg_p)
# =========================================================
df_pos_dedup <- dedup_for_lfc_p(
  df_single,
  lfc_col = "pos_lfc",
  p_col   = "pos_p",
  flip_sign = FALSE
)

df_neg_dedup <- dedup_for_lfc_p(
  df_single,
  lfc_col = "neg_lfc",
  p_col   = "neg_p",
  flip_sign = TRUE
)

safe_write_csv(df_pos_dedup, file.path(out_dir, "mageck_single_targets_deduplicated_positive_selection.csv"))
safe_write_csv(df_neg_dedup, file.path(out_dir, "mageck_single_targets_deduplicated_negative_selection.csv"))

# =========================================================
# RANK VECTORS
# =========================================================
ranks_pos <- make_rank_vector_lfc_p(
  df_pos_dedup,
  lfc_col = "pos_lfc",
  p_col   = "pos_p",
  flip_sign = FALSE
)

ranks_neg <- make_rank_vector_lfc_p(
  df_neg_dedup,
  lfc_col = "neg_lfc",
  p_col   = "neg_p",
  flip_sign = TRUE
)

safe_save_rds(ranks_pos, file.path(out_dir, "ranks_positive_selection_LFCxlog10p.rds"))
safe_save_rds(ranks_neg, file.path(out_dir, "ranks_negative_selection_LFCxlog10p.rds"))

export_rank_table_lfc_p(
  df_pos_dedup,
  lfc_col = "pos_lfc",
  p_col   = "pos_p",
  outfile = file.path(out_dir, "ranks_positive_selection_LFCxlog10p.csv"),
  flip_sign = FALSE
)

export_rank_table_lfc_p(
  df_neg_dedup,
  lfc_col = "neg_lfc",
  p_col   = "neg_p",
  outfile = file.path(out_dir, "ranks_negative_selection_LFCxlog10p.csv"),
  flip_sign = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# MSigDB TERM2GENE builders
# =========================================================
msig_term2gene_symbols <- function(collection, subcollection = NULL,
                                   species = "Homo sapiens") {
  m0 <- msigdbr::msigdbr(
    species = species,
    collection = collection,
    subcollection = subcollection
  )

  m0 %>%
    transmute(
      term = gs_name,
      gene = gene_symbol
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(gene), gene != "") %>%
    distinct()
}

hallmark_t2g <- msig_term2gene_symbols(collection = "H")
c2_t2g       <- msig_term2gene_symbols(collection = "C2")
c5_t2g       <- msig_term2gene_symbols(collection = "C5")

safe_write_csv(hallmark_t2g, file.path(out_dir, "TERM2GENE_Hallmark.csv"))
safe_write_csv(c2_t2g,       file.path(out_dir, "TERM2GENE_C2.csv"))
safe_write_csv(c5_t2g,       file.path(out_dir, "TERM2GENE_C5.csv"))

# =========================================================
# MAP SYMBOL -> ENTREZ for Reactome
# ReactomePA::gsePathway expects ENTREZ IDs
# =========================================================
if (!requireNamespace("org.Hs.eg.db", quietly = TRUE)) {
  stop("Package 'org.Hs.eg.db' is required for Reactome mapping. Please install it.")
}

map_symbol_to_entrez <- function(symbols) {
  map <- tryCatch(
    clusterProfiler::bitr(
      unique(symbols),
      fromType = "SYMBOL",
      toType   = "ENTREZID",
      OrgDb    = org.Hs.eg.db::org.Hs.eg.db
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (is.null(map)) {
    stop("SYMBOL -> ENTREZ mapping failed. Make sure org.Hs.eg.db is installed.")
  }

  map %>%
    distinct(SYMBOL, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    transmute(gene = SYMBOL, entrez = ENTREZID)
}

sym2ent_pos <- map_symbol_to_entrez(df_pos_dedup$gene)
sym2ent_neg <- map_symbol_to_entrez(df_neg_dedup$gene)

safe_write_csv(sym2ent_pos, file.path(out_dir, "SYMBOL_to_ENTREZ_mapping_positive_selection.csv"))
safe_write_csv(sym2ent_neg, file.path(out_dir, "SYMBOL_to_ENTREZ_mapping_negative_selection.csv"))

make_entrez_ranks <- function(symbol_ranks, mapping_df) {
  rank_df <- tibble(
    gene = names(symbol_ranks),
    score = as.numeric(symbol_ranks)
  ) %>%
    left_join(mapping_df, by = "gene") %>%
    filter(!is.na(entrez), !is.na(score), is.finite(score)) %>%
    distinct(entrez, .keep_all = TRUE)

  ranks <- rank_df$score
  names(ranks) <- rank_df$entrez
  sort(ranks, decreasing = TRUE)
}

ranks_pos_entrez <- make_entrez_ranks(ranks_pos, sym2ent_pos)
ranks_neg_entrez <- make_entrez_ranks(ranks_neg, sym2ent_neg)

safe_save_rds(ranks_pos_entrez, file.path(out_dir, "ranks_positive_selection_LFCxlog10p_ENTREZ.rds"))
safe_save_rds(ranks_neg_entrez, file.path(out_dir, "ranks_negative_selection_LFCxlog10p_ENTREZ.rds"))

safe_write_csv(
  tibble(ENTREZID = names(ranks_pos_entrez), rank = unname(ranks_pos_entrez)),
  file.path(out_dir, "ranks_positive_selection_LFCxlog10p_ENTREZ.csv")
)

safe_write_csv(
  tibble(ENTREZID = names(ranks_neg_entrez), rank = unname(ranks_neg_entrez)),
  file.path(out_dir, "ranks_negative_selection_LFCxlog10p_ENTREZ.csv")
)

# =========================================================
# GSEA wrappers
# =========================================================
run_and_save_gsea_term2gene <- function(ranks, term2gene, prefix, out_dir_local,
                                        minGSSize = 10, maxGSSize = 500,
                                        pvalueCutoff = 1, pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                                        eps = 1e-10, nPermSimple = 10000,
                                        showCategory = 20) {

  dir.create(out_dir_local, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  res <- tryCatch(
    suppressMessages(
      suppressWarnings(
        clusterProfiler::GSEA(
          geneList       = ranks,
          TERM2GENE      = term2gene,
          minGSSize      = minGSSize,
          maxGSSize      = maxGSSize,
          pvalueCutoff   = pvalueCutoff,
          pAdjustMethod  = pAdjustMethod,
          eps            = eps,
          by             = "fgsea",
          nPermSimple    = nPermSimple,
          verbose        = FALSE
        )
      )
    ),
    error = function(e) {
      message("WARN: GSEA failed for ", prefix, " | ", e$message)
      NULL
    }
  )

  if (is.null(res)) return(NULL)

  safe_save_rds(res, file.path(out_dir_local, paste0(prefix, ".rds")))

  res_tbl <- safe_result_tbl(res)
  safe_write_csv(res_tbl, file.path(out_dir_local, paste0(prefix, ".csv")))

  if (nrow(res_tbl) > 0) {
    p <- tryCatch(
      enrichplot::dotplot(res, showCategory = min(showCategory, nrow(res_tbl))) +
        ggplot2::ggtitle(prefix),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    if (!is.null(p)) {
      safe_ggsave(file.path(out_dir_local, paste0(prefix, "_dotplot.png")), p)
      safe_ggsave(file.path(out_dir_local, paste0(prefix, "_dotplot.pdf")), p)
    }
  }

  res
}

run_and_save_reactome <- function(ranks_entrez, prefix, out_dir_local,
                                  minGSSize = 10, maxGSSize = 500,
                                  pvalueCutoff = 1, pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                                  eps = 1e-10, nPermSimple = 10000,
                                  showCategory = 20) {

  dir.create(out_dir_local, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  res <- tryCatch(
    suppressMessages(
      suppressWarnings(
        ReactomePA::gsePathway(
          geneList      = ranks_entrez,
          organism      = "human",
          minGSSize     = minGSSize,
          maxGSSize     = maxGSSize,
          pvalueCutoff  = pvalueCutoff,
          pAdjustMethod = pAdjustMethod,
          eps           = eps,
          by            = "fgsea",
          nPermSimple   = nPermSimple,
          verbose       = FALSE
        )
      )
    ),
    error = function(e) {
      message("WARN: Reactome GSEA failed for ", prefix, " | ", e$message)
      NULL
    }
  )

  if (is.null(res)) return(NULL)

  safe_save_rds(res, file.path(out_dir_local, paste0(prefix, ".rds")))

  res_tbl <- safe_result_tbl(res)
  safe_write_csv(res_tbl, file.path(out_dir_local, paste0(prefix, ".csv")))

  if (nrow(res_tbl) > 0) {
    p <- tryCatch(
      enrichplot::dotplot(res, showCategory = min(showCategory, nrow(res_tbl))) +
        ggplot2::ggtitle(prefix),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    if (!is.null(p)) {
      safe_ggsave(file.path(out_dir_local, paste0(prefix, "_dotplot.png")), p)
      safe_ggsave(file.path(out_dir_local, paste0(prefix, "_dotplot.pdf")), p)
    }
  }

  res
}
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# RUN ALL ANALYSES
# =========================================================
analysis_specs <- list(
  list(name = "Hallmark", term2gene = hallmark_t2g),
  list(name = "C2",       term2gene = c2_t2g),
  list(name = "C5",       term2gene = c5_t2g)
)

summary_rows <- list()

for (spec in analysis_specs) {
  coll_name <- spec$name
  coll_t2g  <- spec$term2gene

  coll_dir <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("MSigDB_", coll_name))
  dir.create(coll_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  message("=== Running ", coll_name, " | positive-selection ===")
  res_pos <- run_and_save_gsea_term2gene(
    ranks = ranks_pos,
    term2gene = coll_t2g,
    prefix = paste0(run_label, "__", coll_name, "__positive_selection"),
    out_dir_local = coll_dir
  )

  message("=== Running ", coll_name, " | negative-selection ===")
  res_neg <- run_and_save_gsea_term2gene(
    ranks = ranks_neg,
    term2gene = coll_t2g,
    prefix = paste0(run_label, "__", coll_name, "__negative_selection"),
    out_dir_local = coll_dir
  )

  pos_tbl <- safe_result_tbl(res_pos)
  neg_tbl <- safe_result_tbl(res_neg)

  if (nrow(pos_tbl) > 0) {
    summary_rows[[length(summary_rows) + 1]] <- pos_tbl %>%
      mutate(collection = coll_name, arm = "positive_selection")
  }

  if (nrow(neg_tbl) > 0) {
    summary_rows[[length(summary_rows) + 1]] <- neg_tbl %>%
      mutate(collection = coll_name, arm = "negative_selection")
  }
}

# Reactome
reactome_dir <- file.path(out_dir, "Reactome")
dir.create(reactome_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

message("=== Running Reactome | positive-selection ===")
res_reactome_pos <- run_and_save_reactome(
  ranks_entrez = ranks_pos_entrez,
  prefix = paste0(run_label, "__Reactome__positive_selection"),
  out_dir_local = reactome_dir
)

message("=== Running Reactome | negative-selection ===")
res_reactome_neg <- run_and_save_reactome(
  ranks_entrez = ranks_neg_entrez,
  prefix = paste0(run_label, "__Reactome__negative_selection"),
  out_dir_local = reactome_dir
)

reactome_pos_tbl <- safe_result_tbl(res_reactome_pos)
reactome_neg_tbl <- safe_result_tbl(res_reactome_neg)

if (nrow(reactome_pos_tbl) > 0) {
  summary_rows[[length(summary_rows) + 1]] <- reactome_pos_tbl %>%
    mutate(collection = "Reactome", arm = "positive_selection")
}

if (nrow(reactome_neg_tbl) > 0) {
  summary_rows[[length(summary_rows) + 1]] <- reactome_neg_tbl %>%
    mutate(collection = "Reactome", arm = "negative_selection")
}
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# EXPORT TOP GENE TABLES
# =========================================================
top_pos <- df_pos_dedup %>%
  mutate(rank_metric = compute_lfc_p_metric(pos_lfc, pos_p, flip_sign = FALSE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(rank_metric), pos_fdr, pos_p) %>%
  slice_head(n = 100)

top_neg <- df_neg_dedup %>%
  mutate(rank_metric = compute_lfc_p_metric(neg_lfc, neg_p, flip_sign = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(rank_metric), neg_fdr, neg_p) %>%
  slice_head(n = 100)

safe_write_csv(top_pos, file.path(out_dir, "TOP_positive_selection_genes.csv"))
safe_write_csv(top_neg, file.path(out_dir, "TOP_negative_selection_genes.csv"))

# =========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE + FINAL OUTPUTS
# =========================================================
summary_tbl <- bind_rows(summary_rows)

if (nrow(summary_tbl) > 0) {
  safe_write_csv(summary_tbl, file.path(out_dir, "GSEA_summary_all_results.csv"))
}

keep_cols <- intersect(
  c("ID", "Description", "setSize", "enrichmentScore", "NES", "pvalue", "p.adjust",
    "qvalues", "rank", "leading_edge", "core_enrichment", "collection", "arm"),
  names(summary_tbl)
)

summary_tbl_small <- summary_tbl %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(keep_cols))

safe_write_csv(summary_tbl_small, file.path(out_dir, "GSEA_summary_compact.csv"))

# =========================================================
# CREATE BOTH FINAL MODES
# =========================================================
if (nrow(summary_tbl_small) > 0 &&
    all(c("ID", "NES", "pvalue", "p.adjust", "collection", "arm") %in% names(summary_tbl_small))) {

  save_final_outputs(
    summary_tbl_small = summary_tbl_small,
    out_dir = out_dir,
    filter_mode = "padj_0.3",
    top_n = 15
  )

  save_final_outputs(
    summary_tbl_small = summary_tbl_small,
    out_dir = out_dir,
    filter_mode = "pval_0.05",
    top_n = 15
  )
}

message("Done. Outputs written to: ", out_dir)
```
